requirements.description: Auth: login, register, JWT token management, protected routes, auto-refresh
Dashboard: stats cards, recent activity, upcoming agenda events, conversion charts
Contacts: paginated table with search/filter, create/edit/delete, detail view with opportunities and activity timeline
Pipeline: kanban board with drag-and-drop, 7 stages, expand opportunity details
Catalog: CRUD for faculties, programs, cohorts with hierarchical filtering
Agenda: calendar view (month/week/day), CRUD events, filter by type
Campaigns: list with status badges, create/edit campaign form
Activities: filterable feed by type, contact, date range
Notifications: list with read/unread, mark as read, mark all read
Settings: profile info, change password form
Dark/light mode with next-themes, persisted preference
Responsive design: mobile-first, works on tablet and desktop
Loading skeletons and error states on all pages
